creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Does nobody has any ideas?
It seems that on all platforms we use with php80, the LDAP backend is not working properly - I tried to raise the debug level in nextcloud, but further as Null is not possible.
Checking the OpenLDAP 2.4 backend with occ doesn't reveal any problems - I can list all users, check the config and so on without any error.

Last time we saw a spooky error it wasn't caused by things obvious in the logs, but by some caching issues. But I'm out of ideas here ...
